class.description: Lazy Theta* any-angle global planner. Lets a node's parent be any earlier node it has line of sight to, so paths bend only at obstacle corners and run straight elsewhere (not confined to the 8 grid directions). The lazy variant defers line-of-sight checks to about one per expanded node. Upstream Nav2 ships eager Theta*; this is the distinct lazy variant. Treats the costmap as a binary free/blocked grid (cells >= lethal_threshold are obstacles). Classical (non-learned). Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if no path is found.
